official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_simulation_distance fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official simulation distance body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_simulation_distance to packet id 0x6f.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_simulation_distance id to ClientboundSetSimulationDistancePacket.
The official set_simulation_distance body is one VarInt simulation distance.
The fixture uses a primitive simulation distance only and does not require initialized world tick or entity simulation state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded simulation distance, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove world ticking, entity simulation behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer world ticking, entity simulation behavior, or client-load completion.
